pricing.advanced_discount: 20% discount for bookings made +6 months in advance

exhibitions_x.hero_description: A deep dive into the strokes and textures that define our creative pulse. A visual journey through the unseen works of the collection.

services_hero.description: provides elegant and versatile environments for weddings, corporate conferences, exhibitions, and private celebrations. Every detail is meticulously designed to craft memorable experiences with distinction.

s1.title: Art Exhibitions
s1.desc: The perfect environment to showcase talent and creativity. Featuring curated lighting and a contemporary atmosphere, your artwork will connect with the audience in a unique way. Ideal for solo or collective exhibitions.

s2.title: Cultural Workshops
s2.desc: An inspiring setting for learning, collaboration, and cultural exchange. Adaptable spaces offering comfort and excellent acoustics. Perfect for creative workshops, literary circles, and artistic development.

s3.title: Cinema & Screenings
s3.desc: Experience high-quality visual and acoustic screenings in a community-focused environment. Perfect for independent premieres, thematic cycles, or film forums and audiovisual presentations.

s4.title: Private Gatherings
s4.desc: Intimate and welcoming spaces designed for sharing special moments in total privacy. Whether a family gathering or a personal celebration, we provide the flexibility and service to make it unforgettable.

s5.title: Conferences & Recitals
s5.desc: Designed to elevate communication and the attendee experience. Equipped with modern technology and elegant design, our rooms are ideal for conferences, recitals, and professional training.

s6.title: Corporate Events
s6.desc: The perfect balance of elegance and functionality for corporate anniversaries or boutique celebrations. Tailored attention, versatile furniture, and a sophisticated atmosphere that fosters connection.

event_cta.description: Whether you are planning an intimate gathering or a large-scale corporate event, our dedicated team will work closely with you to customize every architectural and logistical detail.

rules_hero.description: To ensure a harmonious and respectful environment that preserves both the artwork and the experience, we kindly ask all guests and organizers to adhere to the following policies.

rules.intro_2: we strive to maintain a respectful, safe, and functional environment for all our visitors and collaborators. Below are the general rules that ensure a harmonious experience within our facilities.

items.rule_1: Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the premises.
items.rule_2: The space must be left clean unless a professional cleaning service is contracted.
items.rule_3: Any damage to furniture or facilities will be the sole responsibility of the user.
items.rule_4: Responsible consumption of beverages within the venue is required.
items.rule_5: Advanced notice is required if technical assistance or specific setup is needed.

rules.quote: The beauty of the space lies in how we care for it.

reserve_hero.description: Host your event in Bern's most unique venue. Where art, culture, and creativity converge in a single, transformative space.

reserve_form.description: Every event is a blank canvas. Please share the details of what you have in mind. We will contact you shortly to confirm availability and fine-tune every detail of your reservation at Project Room Bern.

placeholders.name: e.g. Elena Rostova
placeholders.message: Tell us more about your idea...

email.subject: Reservation Request
email.intro: I would like to request a reservation for an event at Project Room Bern.
email.footer: I look forward to your prompt response.

service_1.name: Art Exhibitions
service_1.desc: Curated showcases of contemporary artists, providing a dynamic platform for innovative visual expressions.

service_2.name: Private Events
service_2.desc: Exclusive architectural spaces tailored for intimate gatherings, corporate events, and cultural celebrations.

service_3.name: Advisory & Curation
service_3.desc: Expert guidance for collectors and institutions in acquiring, managing, and displaying fine art portfolios.

home_hero.description: Explore an exclusive collection where contemporary art meets avant-garde design. An immersive visual experience curated for those who appreciate pure aesthetics.

home_about.title: A space for art, culture, and social innovation.
home_about.description: Located in the heart of Bern, within the iconic Das Dazwischen, Project Room Bern is an inclusive space open to everyone. We are dedicated to disseminating art across all disciplines, fostering personal development through social innovation and cultural resistance.
home_about.list_1: Continuous collaboration with young emerging artists
home_about.list_2: A hub for curators, educators, and artisans
home_about.list_3: Artistic exchange in the heart of Switzerland

contact.subtitle: Grecia Portorreal — Owner of Project Room Bern
contact.bio_p1_1: Grecia is a visual artist originally from the Dominican Republic. She studied advertising arts at the Universidad Autónoma de Santo Domingo and Fine Arts and Illustration at Altos de Chavón (affiliated with Parsons, NY), graduating
contact.bio_p1_2: . She also completed eight years of rigorous training at the National School of Fine Arts (SD).
contact.bio_p2_1: A specialist in the conservation and restoration of cultural heritage (Spain and Italy), her work has been exhibited across the Dominican Republic, New York, Spain, Italy, and Switzerland. She currently resides in Biel, where she leads
contact.bio_p2_2: to intertwine art, personal development, female entrepreneurship, and social commitment.
contact.whatsapp_msg: Hello Grecia, I would like information about Project Room Bern.

cancellation.description_2: we value responsible planning and respect the time of our clients and team. Below are our cancellation policies applicable to all space reservations.
cancellation.single_desc_3: is offered. If the cancellation occurs within the 30 days prior to the event,
cancellation.extended_desc_3: is offered. If the cancellation occurs within the 2 months prior, a
cancellation.conclusion: These policies aim to ensure equitable and sustainable management for both our guests and the space administration.

artist_hero.description: Founder and principal artist of Project Room Bern. Her work captures the essence of timeless moments, transforming space into a visual dialogue between light and form.

artist.subtitle: Artist & Founder
artist.bio_lead: is originally from the Dominican Republic. Born in Santo Domingo, she studied advertising arts at the Universidad Autónoma de Santo Domingo and fine arts and illustration at the prestigious Altos de Chavón School of Design.
artist.bio_p1: Affiliated with the Parsons School of Design in New York, she graduated Cum Laude. Simultaneously, she dedicated 5 years to studying fine arts at the National School of Visual Arts in Santo Domingo.
artist.bio_p2: Driven by a deep appreciation for history and technique, she later relocated to Spain and Italy, where she specialized in the conservation and restoration of cultural heritage.
artist.bio_p3: Her work has been exhibited internationally across the Dominican Republic, New York, Spain, Italy, and Switzerland.
artist.copyright_1: All published images are protected by copyright and belong to Grecia Portorreal.
artist.copyright_2: Reproduction, distribution, or use without written authorization is strictly prohibited.

artist_cta.subtitle: Private Viewing
artist_cta.description: Experience the creative process firsthand. Schedule a private viewing at Grecia Portorreal's studio in Biel, Switzerland, or request the exclusive portfolio of available works.

who_we_are.subtitle: Who We Are
who_we_are.lead_text: is a new space, open to everyone and to art in all its forms.
who_we_are.p1: We continuously collaborate with emerging artists seeking exhibition opportunities, as well as curators, cultural managers, educators, artisans, and lecturers, to promote art, culture, and personal development.
who_we_are.p2_1: Located in the heart of Bern, within the emblematic
who_we_are.p2_2: —a vibrant center renowned for its eclectic programming and commitment to contemporary arts. This venue hosts experimental music concerts, artistic performances, participatory workshops, and community events, serving as a true platform for creators.
who_we_are.p3: By establishing ourselves in such a symbolic cornerstone of Bern's cultural scene, we amplify our initiative, joining a long-standing tradition of social innovation and cultural resistance.

space_features.desc_2: we have designed a professional environment optimized for creativity: an
space_features.desc_3: equipped with a modern retractable hanging system and adjustable lighting, a
space_features.desc_4: featuring a premium projector and screen, and
space_features.desc_5: that include a functional kitchen, coffee station, and modular furniture for any group size.
space_features.quote: Retractable systems, professional lighting, and full hospitality equipment.
